member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig
member.summary: Configuration settings for the CentralBrain component.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.ErrorCheckInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval for error checking timer.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.StartupRetryInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the interval for startup retry timer when internet is down.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.SnapshotInitialDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets the initial delay before starting snapshot timer.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.OvernightStart
member.summary: Gets or sets the time of day to start overnight tasks (e.g., 3:00 AM).

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.CentralBrainConfig.OvernightTaskDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets the delay after overnight start time to execute tasks.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig
member.summary: Configuration class for market data settings.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig.SemaphoreTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the semaphore timeout in milliseconds. Default is 5000.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig.TickerBatchSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the ticker batch size. Default is 100.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig.ApiRetryTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the API retry timeout in milliseconds. Default is 30000.

member.name: M:BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig.Validate(System.String,BacklashDTOs.Configuration.MarketDataConfig)
member.summary: Validates the configuration options.
member.param: The name of the options instance being validated.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.Converters.MarketSnapshotSlimConverter
member.summary: Recursively slims EVERY MarketSnapshot field for the RawJSON payload. - Write: long → short across the entire JSON tree. - Read: short → long across the entire JSON tree (back-compat). Orderbook rows remain handled by OrderbookSlimConverter.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.APICandlestick
member.summary: Represents a single candlestick data point for a Kalshi market, including price and volume info.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.CandlestickResponse
member.summary: Represents a response containing candlestick data for a specific market on Kalshi.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.EventPosition
member.summary: Represents a user's aggregated position for an event across multiple markets on Kalshi.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.ExchangeStatus
member.summary: Represents the operational status of the Kalshi exchange and trading system.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.KalshiMarket
member.summary: Represents a market on the Kalshi platform with details such as ticker, prices, and trading status.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.MarketPositionApi
member.summary: Represents a user's position in a specific Kalshi market, including trading stats and profit/loss.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.MarketResponse
member.summary: Represents a response containing a list of Kalshi markets and pagination info.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrderApi
member.summary: Represents an order placed on the Kalshi platform with details about its status and execution.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrderbookMessage
member.summary: Represents a message containing order book data, either as a snapshot or delta update.

member.name: M:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrderbookMessage.#ctor(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the OrderbookMessage class from JSON data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrdersResponse.Cursor
member.summary: Gets or sets the pagination cursor for retrieving the next set of orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.OrdersResponse.Orders
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of orders retrieved in the response.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.PositionsResponse
member.summary: Represents a response containing market and event position data.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.PriceData
member.summary: Represents price-related data for a market or event.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.KalshiAPI.PriceLevel
member.summary: Represents a price level in the order book with price and resting contract details.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.OrderbookData
member.summary: Gets or sets the current order book data, containing active buy and sell orders.
member.remarks: Stores a list of dictionaries with order details (price, side, resting contracts, last modified date). Sourced from and converted via . Updated via WebSocket events by . Null if no data is available.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllTimeHighYes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the all-time high bid price for the "Yes" contract and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Highest bid price recorded, in cents (e.g., 72 = $0.72). Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no data. Skips initial candles with zero volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllTimeLowYes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the all-time low bid price for the "Yes" contract and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Lowest bid price recorded, in cents (e.g., 28 = $0.28). Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no data. Skips initial candles with zero volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllTimeHighNo_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the all-time high bid price for the "Yes" contract and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Highest bid price recorded, in cents (e.g., 72 = $0.72). Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no data. Skips initial candles with zero volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllTimeLowNo_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the all-time low bid price for the "Yes" contract and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Lowest bid price recorded, in cents (e.g., 28 = $0.28). Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no data. Skips initial candles with zero volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentHighYes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the recent high bid price for the "Yes" contract (last 3 months) and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Highest bid price in the last 3 months, in cents (e.g., 68 = $0.68). Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no recent data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentLowYes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the recent low bid price for the "Yes" contract (last 3 months) and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Lowest bid price in the last 3 months, in cents (e.g., 32 = $0.32). Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no recent data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentHighNo_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the recent high bid price for the "Yes" contract (last 3 months) and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Highest bid price in the last 3 months, in cents (e.g., 68 = $0.68). Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no recent data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentLowNo_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the recent low bid price for the "Yes" contract (last 3 months) and its timestamp.
member.remarks: Lowest bid price in the last 3 months, in cents (e.g., 32 = $0.32). Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . Default is (0, DateTime.MinValue) if no recent data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AllSupportResistanceLevels
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of historical support and resistance levels for the market.
member.remarks: Contains key price levels (in cents) with strength, touches, and volume data. Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks. Levels are filtered for statistical significance, excluding data from 07:00:00 to 11:59:00 UTC.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the current position size (number of contracts held).
member.remarks: Positive for "Yes" (long), negative for "No" (short) positions. Sourced from , calculated by from . 0 if no position exists. Side is indicated by .

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MarketExposure
member.summary: Gets or sets the total market exposure of the current position in dollars.
member.remarks: Total cost of contracts held, in dollars (cents / 100). Sourced from , calculated by from . Absolute value, 0 if no position.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BuyinPrice
member.summary: Gets or sets the average buy-in price per contract in dollars.
member.remarks: Average price paid per contract (MarketExposure / |PositionSize|), in dollars. Sourced from , calculated by . 0 if no position or PositionSize is 0.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionUpside
member.summary: Gets or sets the potential upside of the current position in dollars.
member.remarks: Potential gain if held to resolution and outcome favors position, in dollars. Sourced from , calculated by as max payout ($1/contract * |PositionSize|) minus liquidation value. Uses order book or current prices. 0 if no position or data unavailable.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionDownside
member.summary: Gets or sets the potential downside of the current position in dollars.
member.remarks: Potential loss if liquidated at current prices, as negative liquidation value in dollars. Sourced from , calculated by using order book or current prices. Typically negative, 0 if no position or data unavailable.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalTraded
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of contracts traded for the current position.
member.remarks: Cumulative contracts traded (bought/sold) for the position. Sourced from , retrieved by from . 0 if no position. Non-negative integer.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RestingOrders
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of resting orders for the market.
member.remarks: Count of open orders (e.g., limit orders) waiting to be filled. Sourced from , retrieved by from . 0 if no orders or position. Non-negative integer.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RealizedPnl
member.summary: Gets or sets the realized profit and loss (PnL) for the position in dollars.
member.remarks: Net profit/loss from closed trades, in dollars (cents / 100). Sourced from , retrieved by from . Positive for profit, negative for loss, 0 if no closed trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.FeesPaid
member.summary: Gets or sets the total fees paid for trades in dollars.
member.remarks: Cumulative trading fees for all trades, in dollars (cents / 100). Sourced from , retrieved by from . Non-negative, 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionROI
member.summary: Gets or sets the return on investment (ROI) for the position as a percentage.
member.remarks: Percentage return: (liquidation price - BuyinPrice) / BuyinPrice * 100. Sourced from , calculated by using order book or current prices. 0 if no position, BuyinPrice is 0, or data unavailable. Positive for profit, negative for loss.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.PositionROIAmt
member.summary: Gets or sets the return on investment (ROI) for the position as a dollar amount.
member.remarks: Sourced from , calculated by using order book or current prices.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.ExpectedFees
member.summary: Gets the expected trading fees for selling the current position in dollars.
member.remarks: Calculated using the formula: fees = roundup(0.07 * C * P * (1-P)), where C is the number of contracts (absolute position size), P is the liquidation price in dollars, and roundup rounds to the next cent. Fees are summed across price levels in the order book when available, or based on the current bid (for "yes" positions) or ask (for "no" positions) price if no orders exist. Only applied for takers, not makers. Sourced from . Returns 0 if no position exists, position size is 0, or data is unavailable.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeRatePerMinute_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the trade rate for "Yes" side trades, in trades per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of "Yes" side trades (taker side = "no") within the change window. Sourced from , computed by using . Number of trades divided by elapsed minutes (capped at ). 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeRatePerMinute_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the trade rate for "No" side trades, in trades per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of "No" side trades (taker side = "yes") within the change window. Sourced from , computed by using . Number of trades divided by elapsed minutes (capped at ). 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeVolumePerMinute_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the trade volume rate for "Yes" side trades, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of "Yes" side trade volume within the change window. Sourced from , computed by using . Sums dollar value (price/100 * |delta contracts|) of trade-related changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeVolumePerMinute_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the trade volume rate for "No" side trades, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of "No" side trade volume within the change window. Sourced from , computed by using . Sums dollar value (price/100 * |delta contracts|) of trade-related changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AverageTradeSize_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the average dollar size of "Yes" side trades.
member.remarks: Average dollar value per "Yes" side trade (taker side = "no"). Sourced from , computed by . Sums dollar value (price/100 * |delta contracts|) divided by trade count. 0 if no trades. Trade count in .

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.AverageTradeSize_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the average dollar size of "No" side trades.
member.remarks: Average dollar value per "No" side trade (taker side = "yes"). Sourced from , computed by . Sums dollar value (price/100 * |delta contracts|) divided by trade count. 0 if no trades. Trade count in .

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeCount_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of "Yes" side trades.
member.remarks: Count of trades with "Yes" as the maker side (taker side = "no"). Sourced from , computed by . Tracks trades in . 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TradeCount_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of "No" side trades.
member.remarks: Count of trades with "No" as the maker side (taker side = "yes"). Sourced from , computed by . Tracks trades in . 0 if no trades.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.NonTradeRelatedOrderCount_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the count of non-trade-related "Yes" side order book changes.
member.remarks: Number of "Yes" side order book changes not linked to trades. Sourced from , computed by using . Tracks changes in with set to false.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.NonTradeRelatedOrderCount_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the count of non-trade-related "No" side order book changes.
member.remarks: Number of "No" side order book changes not linked to trades. Sourced from , computed by using . Tracks changes in with set to false.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.HighestVolume_Day
member.summary: Gets or sets the highest daily trading volume for the market.
member.remarks: Maximum volume traded in a single day, in contracts. Sourced from , calculated by using day candlesticks' . 0 if no day candlesticks or volume data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.HighestVolume_Hour
member.summary: Gets or sets the highest hourly trading volume for the market.
member.remarks: Maximum volume traded in a single hour, in contracts. Sourced from , calculated by using hour candlesticks' . 0 if no hour candlesticks or volume data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.HighestVolume_Minute
member.summary: Gets or sets the highest minute trading volume for the market.
member.remarks: Maximum volume traded in a single minute, in contracts. Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . 0 if no minute candlesticks or volume data.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentVolume_LastHour
member.summary: Gets or sets the total trading volume in the last hour.
member.remarks: Sum of volumes from minute candlesticks in the last hour, in contracts. Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . 0 if no recent data or volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentVolume_LastThreeHours
member.summary: Gets or sets the total trading volume in the last three hours.
member.remarks: Sum of volumes from minute candlesticks in the last three hours, in contracts. Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . 0 if no recent data or volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.RecentVolume_LastMonth
member.summary: Gets or sets the total trading volume in the last month.
member.remarks: Sum of volumes from minute candlesticks in the last month, in contracts. Sourced from , calculated by using minute candlesticks' . 0 if no recent data or volume.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VelocityPerMinute_Bottom_Yes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the velocity of order book changes for bottom "Yes" bid prices, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of change for "Yes" bid prices below 90% of . Sourced from , computed by . Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) of changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no changes. Levels in .

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LevelCount_Bottom_Yes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of price levels for bottom "Yes" bid velocity.
member.remarks: Count of "Yes" bid price levels below 90% of used in . Sourced from , computed by . 0 if no relevant orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VelocityPerMinute_Bottom_No_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the velocity of order book changes for bottom "No" bid prices, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of change for "No" bid prices below 90% of . Sourced from , computed by . Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) of changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no changes. Levels in .

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LevelCount_Bottom_No_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of price levels for bottom "No" bid velocity.
member.remarks: Count of "No" bid price levels below 90% of used in . Sourced from , computed by . 0 if no relevant orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VelocityPerMinute_Top_Yes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the velocity of order book changes for top "Yes" bid prices, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of change for "Yes" bid prices at or above 90% of . Sourced from , computed by . Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) of changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no changes. Levels in .

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LevelCount_Top_Yes_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of price levels for top "Yes" bid velocity.
member.remarks: Count of "Yes" bid price levels at or above 90% of used in . Sourced from , computed by . 0 if no relevant orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VelocityPerMinute_Top_No_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the velocity of order book changes for top "No" bid prices, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of change for "No" bid prices at or above 90% of . Sourced from , computed by . Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) of changes, divided by elapsed minutes. 0 if no changes. Levels in .

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LevelCount_Top_No_Bid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of price levels for top "No" bid velocity.
member.remarks: Count of "No" bid price levels at or above 90% of used in . Sourced from , computed by . 0 if no relevant orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalOrderbookDepth_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total orderbook depth.
member.remarks: Total orderbook depth, in cents Sourced from . 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalOrderbookDepth_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the total orderbook depth.
member.remarks: Total orderbook depth, in cents Sourced from . 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestYesBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "Yes" bid price in the order book.
member.remarks: Highest price offered to buy "Yes" contracts, in cents. Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestNoBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "No" bid price in the order book.
member.remarks: Highest price offered to buy "No" contracts, in cents. Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestYesBidD
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "Yes" bid price in the order book.
member.remarks: Highest price offered to buy "Yes" contracts, in cents. This is the dollars version of the price which is included to ease the transition later. Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestNoBidD
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "No" bid price in the order book. This is the dollars version of the price which is included to ease the transition later.
member.remarks: Highest price offered to buy "No" contracts, in cents. Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestYesAsk
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "Yes" ask price in the order book.
member.remarks: Lowest price offered to sell "Yes" contracts (equals best "No" bid), in cents. Sourced from , computed from . 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BestNoAsk
member.summary: Gets or sets the best "No" ask price in the order book.
member.remarks: Lowest price offered to sell "No" contracts (equals best "Yes" bid), in cents. Sourced from , computed from . 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.YesSpread
member.summary: Gets or sets the spread between "Yes" ask and bid prices.
member.remarks: Difference between and , in cents. Sourced from . 0 if no orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.NoSpread
member.summary: Gets or sets the spread between "No" ask and bid prices.
member.remarks: Difference between and , in cents. Sourced from . 0 if no orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.DepthAtBestYesBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of resting contracts at the best "Yes" bid price.
member.remarks: Total contracts at . Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.DepthAtBestNoBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of resting contracts at the best "No" bid price.
member.remarks: Total contracts at . Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TopTenPercentLevelDepth_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the cumulative resting contracts for "Yes" bid orders within tolerance.
member.remarks: Total contracts for "Yes" bids within below . Sourced from , computed by . 0 if no orders within range.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TopTenPercentLevelDepth_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the cumulative resting contracts for "No" bid orders within tolerance.
member.remarks: Total contracts for "No" bids within below . Sourced from , computed by . 0 if no orders within range.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BidRange_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the price range of "Yes" bid orders.
member.remarks: Difference between highest and lowest "Yes" bid prices, in cents. Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BidRange_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the price range of "No" bid orders.
member.remarks: Difference between highest and lowest "No" bid prices, in cents. Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalBidContracts_Yes
member.summary: Gets or sets the total resting contracts for "Yes" bid orders.
member.remarks: Total contracts available for "Yes" bids. Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TotalBidContracts_No
member.summary: Gets or sets the total resting contracts for "No" bid orders.
member.remarks: Total contracts available for "No" bids. Sourced from , computed from using . 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BidCountImbalance
member.summary: Gets or sets the imbalance between "Yes" and "No" bid contracts.
member.remarks: Difference: - . Sourced from . Positive for "Yes" dominance, negative for "No". 0 if no bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.BidVolumeImbalance
member.summary: Gets or sets the imbalance between "Yes" and "No" bid contracts * price.
member.remarks: Difference: - . Sourced from . Positive for "Yes" dominance, negative for "No". 0 if no bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.DepthAtTop4YesBids
member.summary: Gets or sets the total resting contracts for top four "Yes" bid price levels.
member.remarks: Sum of contracts at four highest "Yes" bid prices. Sourced from , computed from using . Sums all levels if fewer than four. 0 if no "Yes" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.DepthAtTop4NoBids
member.summary: Gets or sets the total resting contracts for top four "No" bid price levels.
member.remarks: Sum of contracts at four highest "No" bid prices. Sourced from , computed from using . Sums all levels if fewer than four. 0 if no "No" bid orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VWAP_Short
member.summary: Gets or sets the short-term VWAP (15 periods, minute candlesticks).
member.remarks: Volume-weighted average price, in cents. Sourced from , computed by . Null if insufficient data, zero volume, or invalid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.VWAP_Medium
member.summary: Gets or sets the medium-term VWAP (15 periods, hour candlesticks).
member.remarks: Volume-weighted average price, in cents. Sourced from , computed by . Null if insufficient data, zero volume, or invalid.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.ChangeMetricsMature
member.summary: Gets or sets whether change metrics are mature.
member.remarks: Indicates if order book change metrics are stable based on market activity duration. Sourced from , determined by .

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MarketAge
member.summary: Gets or sets the market's age.
member.remarks: Time since market opened, in days. Sourced from . Used to assess market maturity.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TimeLeft
member.summary: Gets or sets the time remaining until market close.
member.remarks: Time until market resolution, in days. Sourced from . Negative if market is closed.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.CanCloseEarly
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the market can close early.
member.remarks: Indicates if the market may resolve before its scheduled close. Sourced from . Affects trading strategy.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.LastWebSocketMessageReceived
member.summary: Gets or sets the timestamp of the last WebSocket message received.
member.remarks: Indicates the most recent update from the exchange. Sourced from . MinValue if no messages.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MarketBehaviorYes
member.summary: Gets or sets the "Yes" side market behavior classification.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.MarketBehaviorNo
member.summary: Gets or sets the "No" side market behavior classification.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.GoodBadPriceYes
member.summary: Gets or sets the "Yes" side price quality assessment.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.GoodBadPriceNo
member.summary: Gets or sets the "No" side price quality assessment.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.HoldTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the holding period for the current position, in days.
member.remarks: Time since position was opened. Sourced from . 0 if no position.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.OrderVolumePerMinute_YesBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the order rate for "Yes" bid orders, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of non-trade-related "Yes" bid order changes. Sourced from , computed by . Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) divided by elapsed minutes.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.OrderVolumePerMinute_NoBid
member.summary: Gets or sets the order rate for "No" bid orders, in dollars per minute.
member.remarks: Rate of non-trade-related "No" bid order changes. Sourced from , computed by . Sums dollar value (price/100 * delta contracts) divided by elapsed minutes.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.YesBidCenterOfMass
member.summary: Gets or sets the center of mass for "Yes" bid orders.
member.remarks: Weighted average price of "Yes" bid orders, in cents. Sourced from , computed from . 0 if no orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.NoBidCenterOfMass
member.summary: Gets or sets the center of mass for "No" bid orders.
member.remarks: Weighted average price of "No" bid orders, in cents. Sourced from , computed from . 0 if no orders.

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.MarketSnapshot.TolerancePercentage
member.summary: Gets or sets the tolerance percentage for cumulative depth calculations.
member.remarks: Percentage (e.g., 5%) used to define price range for and . Sourced from . Typically 5%.

member.name: T:BacklashDTOs.OrderbookData
member.summary: Represents orderbook data for a specific market, focused on orderbook entries.

member.name: M:BacklashDTOs.OrderbookData.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes orderbook data with a market ticker, orderbook, and optional MarketData reference.

member.name: M:BacklashDTOs.OrderbookData.RefreshOrderbookMetadata
member.summary: Refreshes metadata based on orderbook data (placeholder).

member.name: P:BacklashDTOs.OrderbookData.MarketTicker
member.summary: Gets or sets the market ticker.
